policies.name: ai_content_marked
policies.description: AI-generated client-facing content is marked or labelled as AI-generated/synthetic.

policies.name: ai_inventory_recorded
policies.description: AI systems producing decisions or outputs are recorded in the firm's AI inventory.

policies.name: ai_outcomes_logged
policies.description: Every AI decision or output is recorded, with the model version that produced it, throughout the AI system lifecycle.

policies.name: ai_use_disclosed
policies.description: Clients are informed when an AI system is generating client-facing responses or analysis.

policies.name: consent_for_ai_decisions
policies.description: Client consent is recorded where AI materially affects client rights, account access, or privacy.

policies.name: decision_logic_recorded
policies.description: Each AI output documents the decision-making logic and reasoning behind it (explainability).

policies.name: human_oversight_evidenced
policies.description: Investor- or market-impacting AI outcomes carry evidence of human oversight or intervention.

policies.name: incidents_root_caused
policies.description: AI-related incidents are recorded with root-cause analysis and remediation actions.

policies.name: no_ai_washing
policies.description: Public claims about the firm's AI are substantiated and not overstated (no 'AI-washing').

policies.name: output_action_traceable
policies.description: Every consequential action is traceable to a logged AI output that preceded it.

policies.name: reportable_incident_notified
policies.description: Reportable AI incidents are notified to the supervisory authority.
